text_orig: 🇮🇱Prime Minister Netanyahu is currently meeting with senior Israeli defense officials.
text_en: 🇮🇱Prime Minister Netanyahu is currently meeting with senior Israeli defense officials.

text_orig:
⚡Prime Minister Netanyahu: 

“I have conveyed and clarified to the Ayatollahs’ regime that if they make what might be the gravest mistake in their history and attack the State of Israel, we will respond with a force they cannot even imagine.”
text_en:
⚡Prime Minister Netanyahu: 

“I have conveyed and clarified to the Ayatollahs’ regime that if they make what might be the gravest mistake in their history and attack the State of Israel, we will respond with a force they cannot even imagine.”

text_orig: ⚠️The State Department has ordered the departure of non-emergency staff and eligible family members from the US Embassy in Beirut.
text_en: ⚠️The State Department has ordered the departure of non-emergency staff and eligible family members from the US Embassy in Beirut.

text_orig: 🦅 The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier was spotted off the coast of Crete today as it makes its way to the Middle East to support potential military action against Iran’s Islamist terror regime.
text_en: 🦅 The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier was spotted off the coast of Crete today as it makes its way to the Middle East to support potential military action against Iran’s Islamist terror regime.
